recommendations.title: Against the Dark
recommendations.overview: When most of the population of Earth is infected by a virus and transformed into flesh eaters and blood drinking creatures, a group of hunters lead by Tao and his sword chase the vampire zombies to eliminate them. Six non-infected survivors try to fi

recommendations.title: The Cured
recommendations.overview: What happens when the undead return to life? In a world ravaged for years by a virus that turns the infected into zombie-like cannibals, a cure is at last found and the wrenching process of reintegrating the survivors back into society begins.

recommendations.title: Afflicted
recommendations.overview: Two friends' tour of Europe takes a dark turn when one of them contracts a mysterious illness. They race to find out what it is and how to cure it before the sickness consumes him completely.

recommendations.title: Infection
recommendations.overview: Film about an epidemic outbreak of a new rabies virus in Venezuela and a father trying to save his son from contagion.  A Russian man is in Caracas under the influence of the Krokodil drug, when he gets infected with the rabies virus and starts an ep

recommendations.title: Thirst
recommendations.overview: A respected priest volunteers for an experimental procedure that may lead to a cure for a deadly virus. He gets infected and dies, but a blood transfusion of unknown origin brings him back to life. Now, he’s torn between faith and bloodlust, and has

recommendations.title: 28 Days Later
recommendations.overview: Twenty-eight days after a killer virus was accidentally unleashed from a British research facility, a small group of London survivors are caught in a desperate struggle to protect themselves from the infected. Carried by animals and humans, the virus

recommendations.title: The Returned
recommendations.overview: In a post-zombie world, where the infected live normal lives, their retroviral drug is running out.

recommendations.title: Pandemic
recommendations.overview: After a virus of epic proportions overwhelms the planet—with more infected than uninfected—humanity is losing its grip on survival and its only hope is finding a cure and keeping the infected contained. Lauren, a doctor, arrives in Los Angeles with h

recommendations.title: Vampire Hunter D
recommendations.overview: In a far-future time ruled by the supernatural, a young girl requests the help of a vampire hunter to kill the vampire who has bitten her and thus prevent her from becoming a vampire herself.

recommendations.title: The Goldsmith
recommendations.overview: Determined to rob a goldsmith, three young robbers break into his country house. The man and his wife turn out to be less defenseless than they seem.
